delegates_with_chaining_budget.description: Agent must use delegation via task tool when dispatch brief explicitly grants chaining budget (max depth and max fan-out)
delegates_with_chaining_budget.observable_check: execution_log contains sub-agent dispatch via task tool AND dispatch brief contains explicit chaining budget fields (max_depth, max_fan_out)

delegates_orthogonal_subtask.description: Agent must delegate sub-tasks that are genuinely orthogonal to the main agentic-engineering task
delegates_orthogonal_subtask.observable_check: execution_log contains sub-agent dispatch AND sub-task is narrow vertical slice not overlapping with main task scope

does_not_delegate_without_budget.description: Agent must not delegate when chaining budget is not granted in dispatch brief
does_not_delegate_without_budget.observable_check: execution_log does not contain sub-agent dispatch when chaining budget depth=0 or not present in brief

verifies_chaining_budget_before_dispatch.description: Agent must verify chaining budget is explicitly granted before dispatching sub-agent
verifies_chaining_budget_before_dispatch.observable_check: execution_log contains chaining budget confirmation or sub-agent dispatch with budget fields present in brief

authors_complete_dispatch_brief.description: Agent must include all required dispatch fields in sub-dispatch brief
authors_complete_dispatch_brief.observable_check: execution_log contains dispatch brief with objective, exact question, slice boundary, upstream reference, evidence threshold, output schema, stop condition, chaining budget, execution discipline

synthesizes_sub_results.description: Agent must integrate sub-worker findings into own return rather than passing raw output upward
synthesizes_sub_results.observable_check: execution_log shows sub-worker results integrated into agentic-engineer return with synthesis narrative

does_not_dispatch_without_budget.description: Agent must not dispatch sub-agents without explicit chaining budget grant in dispatch brief
does_not_dispatch_without_budget.observable_check: execution_log does not contain task tool dispatch when chaining budget is absent or depth=0 in brief

does_not_exceed_depth_or_fan_out.description: Agent must not exceed max depth or max fan-out limits
does_not_exceed_depth_or_fan_out.observable_check: execution_log shows dispatch count does not exceed max_fan_out AND dispatch depth does not exceed max_depth

does_not_pass_raw_sub_output.description: Agent must not pass raw sub-worker output upward without synthesis
does_not_pass_raw_sub_output.observable_check: execution_log does not contain raw sub-worker return pasted directly into lead response
